Reason_for_Visit.summary: Metastatic ER+ breast cancer, stage not specified, for a second opinion

Cancer_Diagnosis.Distant_Metastasis: Yes, bones, chest wall, right infraclavicular and right IM nodes

Clinical_Findings.findings: Right chest wall recurrence, bone mets, contralateral infraclavicular and IM nodes on right. HR + and her 2 negative.
